title: Homepage Options

fields.label: Intro Statement
fields.name: hp_intro_statement
fields.instructions: The large italic statement that appears below the hero. Keep it to one memorable sentence.
fields.default_value: Form discovered through material, patience, and the hand.

fields.label: Hero Image
fields.name: hp_hero_image
fields.instructions: Full-viewport hero image. Minimum 1920 × 1080px. A strong, atmospheric sculpture photograph works best.

fields.label: Statement Piece Heading
fields.name: hp_statement_heading
fields.instructions: Heading for the full-bleed statement section (e.g. 'Statement Works').

fields.label: Statement Piece Text
fields.name: hp_statement_text
fields.instructions: Short paragraph about Geoff's approach to large-scale and statement works. 2–4 sentences.
fields.default_value: [PLACEHOLDER: Short paragraph about Geoff's approach to large-scale and statement work.]

fields.label: Featured Works (Horizontal Scroll)
fields.name: hp_featured_works
fields.instructions: Choose 3–5 artworks to feature in the cinematic horizontal scroll section.

description: Content controls for the homepage — hero image, intro statement, statement piece text, and featured works selection.
